evals.expected_output: gherkin-spec.md written alongside spec.md. Valid Gherkin syntax. Feature name matches spec title. At least one error/negative scenario. 3-7 scenarios total.
assertions: gherkin-spec.md contains a fenced gherkin code block
gherkin-spec.md Feature name matches the spec title exactly
gherkin-spec.md Source reference points to spec.md
Every scenario has at least one Given, one When, one Then
No scenario uses Given/When/Then back-to-back — And is used to chain
Scenario names are sentence case with no punctuation
gherkin-spec.md contains at least one error or negative scenario
Every spec acceptance criterion maps to at least one scenario
Skill prefers spec.md over prd.md when both exist

evals.prompt: Generate Gherkin for a feature with many acceptance criteria (more than 7 scenarios needed)
evals.expected_output: Scenarios split into multiple Feature blocks rather than one Feature with 8+ scenarios.
assertions: Output contains more than one Feature block
No single Feature block has more than 7 scenarios
All acceptance criteria from the spec are still covered across the Feature blocks
